title: GPT-6 Is Launching Into a World OpenAI No Longer Controls
summary: The video discusses GPT-6 rumors and claims that while OpenAI delayed, competitors like Microsoft, Apple, and Google integrated alternative models including Gemini and Claude. It covers reported competitive losses including Microsoft's Project Polaris replacing GPT in GitHub Copilot and Apple's $1B/year Gemini deal.
writeup: The video examines GPT-6 rumors alongside the argument that OpenAI's delays opened room for competitors to integrate alternative models. It reports that Microsoft, Apple, and Google adopted models such as Gemini and Claude, with specific claims that Microsoft's Project Polaris is replacing GPT in GitHub Copilot and that Apple signed a $1B per year Gemini deal. The core takeaway: OpenAI is releasing into a market where major platform partners have already diversified their model sources.
